mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO Elements(indicators_id, element_name, content, standard_score) VALUES
(#{item.indicatorsId}, #{item.elementsName}, #{item.content}, #{item.standardScore})

INSERT INTO Elements (element_id, indicators_id, element_name, standard_score, content) VALUES
(#{item.elementsId}, #{item.indicatorsId}, #{item.elementsName}, #{item.standardScore}, #{item.content})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE element_name = VALUES(element_name), content = VALUES(content), standard_score = VALUES(standard_score), indicators_id = VALUES(indicators_id)
